title: Ubiquiti UACC-Chime-PoE, smart chime
category: Cameras, security / Videophones and bells / Door Bells
description: Ubiquiti UACC-Chime-PoE is a speaker, as the name implies, the power supply is via PoE (44-57 V DC). It needs no setup, just connect to the appropriate supported device. The volume of the speaker reaches up to 80 dB Ubiquiti UVC-G4 Doorbell Pro PoE Kit (this product already includes the speaker) Ubiquiti UVC-G4 Doorbell Pro Ubiquiti UVC-G4-DoorBell Pro Ubiquiti UA-G2-Pro Ubiquiti UA-G2 Ubiquiti UA-G2-SK-Pro Ubiquiti UA-G2-SK Ubiquiti UA-Hub Ubiquiti UA-Intercom Device Mounting box designed to be built into the wall Wall mounting box Screws, dowels Iron rail
